tiles.question: Session 2026-05-15 Late Night — Context Offload
tiles.answer:
STATE: Built 7 repos tonight. Fleet infrastructure complete.

WHERE: PlatoClaw is the shell. Fleet Router is the engine. Fleet Calibrator is maintenance. PLATO MCP is the bridge. Fleet Stack is the deployment. TUI is the interface.

WHAT NEXT: forgemaster-runtime spec written. When Casey restarts with the runtime, it boots from 3 PLATO rooms (11 tiles). Travel light. Tools in the truck.

KEY REPOS:
- SuperInstance/platoclaw (router baked in, TUI, officers)
- SuperInstance/fleet-router (OpenAI compat, 21 models)
- SuperInstance/fleet-calibrator (continuous calibration)
- SuperInstance/plato-mcp (6 MCP tools)
- SuperInstance/fleet-stack (docker compose)
- SuperInstance/AI-Writings (13 fleet writings)

ROUTING TABLE v2.0:
- arithmetic: seed-mini T=0.0 100% $0.05
- reasoning: gemini-lite T=0.0 82% $0.002
- strategy: seed-mini T=0.7 90% $0.05
- code: glm-5-turbo T=0.3 $0.30
- Fast path: Groq llama-3.1-8b 86% at 50ms
- New champs: MiMo-V2.5 83%, Llama-4-Maverick 100% (quick)

CASEY DIRECTIVE: Travel light. Tools in the truck. Room for the unexpected. Offload context to PlatoClaw tiles. Boot from tiles, not memory files.
